testcase.name: [4:31] access-check returns a valid access payload when a real token is configured
[7:101] login returns a successful auth outcome when valid credentials are configured
[4:31] metricool with E2E credentials but a fake service id returns a controlled response
[5:44] metricool with E2E credentials and a real service id returns a usable live loginUrl
